name: Stoichiometrical
description: A chemistry educational app for learning and practicing stoichiometry.

metadata.title: Stoichiometrical
metadata.description: Practice stoichiometry problems with guided inputs, visual pathways, and step-by-step math.
metadata.imageAlt: Stoichiometrical app preview showing visual stoichiometry conversions.

name: Ideal Gas Law Explorer
description: An educational app for exploring relationships in the ideal gas law.

metadata.title: Ideal Gas Law Explorer
metadata.description: Explore how pressure, volume, temperature, and moles connect through PV = nRT.
metadata.imageAlt: A colorful equation map connecting Boyle's, Charles', Gay-Lussac's, and Avogadro's laws to PV equals nRT.
